description: Geological survey data for potential silo locations (Nevada, Siberia, Canadian Northern Territories). Includes soil composition, seismic activity, and groundwater levels. Used to assess site suitability. Intended audience: Geotechnical Engineers. Context: Site selection.
steps_to_find: Contact geological survey agencies in the USA, Russia, and Canada.
Search online databases for geological survey data.
Review existing mining reports and geological maps.
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires contacting specific agencies and potentially requesting data.

description: Historical and current climate data for potential silo locations. Includes temperature, precipitation, and extreme weather events. Used to assess long-term environmental stability. Intended audience: Ecosystems and Sustainability Director. Context: Environmental impact assessment.
recency_requirement: Historical data and most recent available data
steps_to_find: Contact meteorological agencies in the USA, Russia, and Canada.
Search online databases for climate data (e.g., NOAA, Environment Canada).
Review existing climate reports and studies.
access_difficulty: Easy: Publicly available data from meteorological agencies.

description: Environmental regulations and standards in the USA, Russia, and Canada. Includes air and water quality standards, waste management regulations, and protected species lists.
